Mask of Fall
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FACE
AC: 15
INT: +7 MANA: +55
SV DISEASE: +10 SV POISON: +10
Focus: Improved Healing III
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Stackable:No

Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Rarity: Rare

Uploaded March 13th, 2022 by halfridge
Send a correction
Post Comment
lv to get to ToV
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2003 at 11:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788689487
3 posts
yup thats basically it what lv is that area and is any lv required to go there.

I am lv 49 halfling druid at the time on Tarrew Marr server.

▲ Page top
RE: lv to get to ToV
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2003 at 6:15 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361376302
54 posts
minimum level 55, but you'll hurt a lot. i'd say 59 or 60+, because you'll have a better chance of resisting some of the AEs and subject your raid to fewer adds from aggro to your low level.
Minimum-All resists over 100, without any buffs whatsoever. 'bout 3k in the bazaar will get you gear to get you up into the 80s or 90s range, so it's not so important any more(but you'd be surprised by how many people go to tov with insufficient resists...)
Be in a raiding guild. Nowadays everyone is in luclin or PoP, so you'll probably need to find a new raid guild that's doing following the raid guild roadmap to get people into here. Don't get me wrong though; plenty of stunning stuff drops here; just most people want to get to the newer, bigger badder things.
i wouldn't reccomend going to this place with your guild *unless* you've got HoT down pat, and skyshrine armor is abundant in your guild.
all told, this place is a trip.
▲ Page top
Why?
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2002 at 1:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759464793
28 posts
Anyone else find it odd that it has +7Int and a healing focus? Shouldn't it have +7Wis since the main healers are clerics who use Wisdom.
▲ Page top
RE: Why?
QuoteReply
# May 09 2003 at 6:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245905595
343 posts
Its design intent is for mages and necro's for thier pet heals.
▲ Page top
Focus!
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2002 at 12:15 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749858043
View User Forum
37 posts
I dont have this item, but was told it was actually a HEAL III focus, not as listed above. Sure wish all these damn focus items were correct, would make it easier to find what im looking for. and /rude Verant for ******** it all up on implementation! Dumbass!!
▲ Page top
Heh
QuoteReply
# Sep 17 2001 at 6:08 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591756251336
19 posts
I wear this mask as an enchanter. It has more mana for the face than any other item outside of ToV (With the exception of the CT eye), and when raiding or grouping, I find the more mana the better. Having that much AC on the face is nice too... my AC has gone up considerably since raiding NToV, but unlike many people, I don't focus on AC/HP as much as I do mana.
Since I spend most of my time raiding, I'm going up against critters where 20 more AC added to my 750 AC or 50 more HP won't make any difference. And if I'm getting hit to where AC matters, I'm doing something terribly wrong. But the more mana I have the more c2/sieves/cripples/ghetto slows/wis, int, and mana buffs I can do. Since my mana is my main tool on raids, any item that gives this much is well worth it to me.
The int and saves are nice, but what makes this an exceptionally good caster item is the mana, pure and simple. Most melee will have better than this for their face. A large number of excellent melee face items exist, both within ToV and without.

Ainyan Dreamweaver
57 Enchanter
Blades of Wrath, Torvonnilous
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 25 2001 at 12:36 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I'm loving when people gripe about items unless they are +10 to 4-5 stats any more. EQ is seriously under the Bigger Badder Number Syndrome as of late.
Good for anyone
QuoteReply
# May 25 2001 at 8:54 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591756686121
14 posts
Good item if you are going on a Trak raid....Might just have to look into getting one.
▲ Page top
RE: Good for anyone
QuoteReply
# May 25 2001 at 12:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757690976
36 posts
Since it's no drop from ToV I'd assume most of the people that can get this already have something like a electrum diamond mask, but this is a nice alternative for the caster who wants his resists and his int/mana too. Also for the tank who wants the resists but hates giving up the ac. This isn't the greatest thing in the world, but it's a nice item especially for trakanon and perhaps for the new plane of plague(or whatever it's called) when it comes out. It's actually not bad as int/mana masks go either.

#Anonymous, Posted: May 25 2001 at 7:05 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Was sorta disappointing to see this drop. With like 40 or so hp, or 4 more ac, this woulda been a pretty good mask.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 25 2001 at 2:31 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) actually both, mana AND resists
actually
QuoteReply
# May 24 2001 at 9:48 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
There aren't many face items that aren't part of full suit. Now, if this wasn't NO DROP, I'd wear it in a heartbeat, but since it is and it's unattainable until such a high level that the melee classes would have better.

What I'm saying is, it's not a bad face at all for hybrids (i.e. Pally's or Ranger's in specific). But both should have better by this time (I'm unsure about Rangers)
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 24 2001 at 10:39 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Why on earth would a wisdom caster want this? For the resists or mana? That's retarded. ONLY intelligence casters should even be allowed to roll. Anyone else rolling for this is stupid.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 25 2001 at 2:48 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Well the way I see it is that SK well make the best use out of this item. BUT for what I see anything with all/all on it means anyone can roll for it.

im a monk, go for it casters its obscene for a tank to roll on that =D
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 24 2001 at 7:11 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hey! i need it for my monk! cause monks need mana tooooo, and it sucks that you guys get all the phat lewtz, and us monks are forced to forsake rolling, i mean we cant carry cash, and we are terribly missunderstood. We are the most harassed class, we get nothing and are expected to brazely pull from all ends of the earth to our partyies that just sit there soaking up the xp, and those bloody clerics get all the phat gems and i get none, and the casters get words and the tanks get all sorts of cool armor, and we get nothing. Waaaaaaaaaaaa! I you dont just give me this mask for the sheer audacity of me being in your party i am going to quit you guild! *sob*

# May 27 2001 at 7:37 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570578538
Scholar
18 posts
The post you replied to was taking the rip out of the monks who continue to claim that any item in the game is, or should be, made for them.

If you wish to direct your wrath at anyone I suggest it's the idiots who are so egocentric that they can't see the merit things have for others!

And while this is a reasonable mid-range monk item it's also good for any int caster, particularly encs from the number of hits they take.

(-: Zel :-)

ps: I play a bard and wouldn't roll on this!
